sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108199" key="u(pogna/mptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπογνάμπτω</orth>, <sense id="n108199.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bend,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ψυχῆς ὁρμήν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg008.perseus-grc1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Mart.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
